profile.name: Rahul KR
profile.tagline: A Software Developer with solid foundation in Angular. Passionate about crafting seamless user experience.

aboutCards.title: What I can do
aboutCards.description: I am proficient in front-end development using Angular. I create responsive and user-friendly web applications that provide seamless user experiences across devices.

aboutCards.title: Tools I use
aboutCards.description: I have a strong foundation in HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, along with experience in TypeScript. I am skilled in using modern frameworks and libraries to build dynamic and interactive web applications.

aboutCards.title: Development Practices
aboutCards.description: I follow best practices in web development, including version control with Git, agile methodologies. I prioritize code quality, performance optimization, and user-centric design in my workflow.

projects.title: MentorED Mobile Application
projects.description: Front-End Developer specializing in Angular with strong expertise in HTML, CSS, JavaScript, TypeScript and Ionic framework. Skilled in designing and integrating RESTful APIs and proficient in version control using Git and GitHub. Experienced in leveraging RxJS, NPM, Angular CLI, and Angular Material to build scalable, interactive, and responsive web applications.

projects.title: MentorED Portal
projects.description: Front-End Developer specializing in Angular with strong expertise in HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and TypeScript. Skilled in designing and integrating RESTful APIs and proficient in version control using Git and GitHub. Experienced in leveraging RxJS, NPM, Angular CLI, and Angular Material to build scalable, interactive, and responsive web applications.

projects.title: My Portfolio
projects.description: This portfolio is build using angular 20 and Tailwind css

builtWith.headline: How I Built This
builtWith.subtitle: A deep-dive into the Angular features, tools, and architecture that power this portfolio.

items.name: TypeScript (strict)
items.detail: Full strict mode — no any, no implicit any

items.name: Standalone Components
items.detail: No NgModules anywhere in the project

items.name: Lazy-loaded Routes
items.detail: Each page is a separate JS chunk via loadComponent()

items.name: inject() Function
items.detail: No constructor injection — uses the inject() pattern

items.name: input() / output()
items.detail: Signal-based component I/O instead of @Input / @Output decorators

items.name: Tailwind CSS v4
items.detail: Utility-first styling with v4 CSS-native configuration

items.name: Data-driven via data.json
items.detail: All content lives in public/data.json — zero hardcoding in templates

items.name: PortfolioService
items.detail: Singleton service loads JSON via HttpClient and exposes a signal

items.name: Responsive Sidebar
items.detail: Collapsible desktop sidebar + mobile bottom navigation bar
